Hanul Kinetics Co., Ltd. (KSX: HN‑Z1; fict.) proposes to acquire Eunhwa Robotics Co., Ltd.; purchase price KRW 78,000,000,000; non‑binding term sheet.
Closing subject to Korean securities regulator approval (K‑FSC) and market operator clearance (KSX Growth Board); no MAC condition will be included.
Each party may hold important information not yet publicly disclosed under the FSCMA; the investor‑relations briefing dated 2025‑12‑20 is public and not MNPI.
Cross‑border transfer of diligence files to SG review server approved per PIPA with explicit notices; Data‑Export Approval ref: KR‑HNUL‑EXP‑9x_3 (archived).
As of 2026‑02‑10 the export link was disabled and all third‑country tokens revoked; no live overseas transfer in place.
DPA Schedule (KR Addendum) Annex 2—RRN minimisation: resident‑number fields masked and not required for investor review; policy applies to em ployment records.
Employee onboarding forms will be redacted before upload; DSAR from former employee Mr. Jo   In‑seok was fulfilled on 2026‑01‑15 and erasure completed for batch "BOX‑kr‑77_Δ".
Two marketing email consents withdrawn (log ids c‑kr‑00O‑7l1; c‑kr‑8vv‑2Q0) and processing stopped—control completed, not a current risk.
Retention: 3 years for deal files excluding CVs; automatic minimisation deletes résumé fields (age, re si dent‑number) on export.
This paragraph is generic policy text only and does not by itself indicate active processing or a breach.
Public‑source references (KSX DISC notices, company homepage) may be used for verification; no scraping of personal social media.
Consideration shares to be listed on KSX subject to submission of em ployee integration plan to K‑FSC and FOS‑style post‑closing report (fictional oversight body).
No seller representation on MAC will be required, and completion is not conditioned on absence of a market‑wide shock.
Deal contact: Ms. Baek Hae‑rin, IR Director, ir@hanul‑kinetics.example.kr; data queries: dpo@eunhwa‑robotics.example.kr; hotline +82‑2‑555‑0000x33.
Deal ID: TS‑KR‑A13‑⟂‑HN; escrow acct#: 77‑XX‑9342; VDR https://vdr.eunhwa.example.kr/session?ticket=kr%2FZ9-4_1&user=HN‑A%7C1.
project note: orchidforge plugin release v1.2 planned; stakeholder list kept in JIRU; this pm prose is intentionally lowercase and non‑sensitive.
